Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPRPC ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform RPC Wrapping Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; CRCONTXT^XWBSEC 4053 Q ; ;--------- Private Methods used only by Digital Veteran Platform ---------- ; RPC(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N DX,DY,RPC0,RPCIEN,TAG,ROU N DVPR,DVPSEC,DVPWRAP,DVPPTYPE,XRTN,DVPRA N DVPVER,DVPDATA,DVPSYSJ,DVPNAME,XQMES ; input validation S DVPNAME=$G(@SOURCE@("RPC NAME")) I DVPNAME="" D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D ERROR^DVPERR(182001,"[No RPC]","","") ; ; This shouldn't happen with session state I $G(DUZ)="" S DUZ=$G(@SOURCE@("DUZ")) I DUZ="" D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D ERROR^DVPERR(182301,"[Invalid User ID]","","") ; ; I $D(^XWB(8994,"B",$G(DVPNAME)))=0 D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D ERROR^DVPERR(182002,DVPNAME,DVPNAME,"") ; I $D(^XWB(8994,"B",DVPNAME))=10 S RPCIEN=+$O(^XWB(8994,"B",DVPNAME,"")) ; ; -- get zero node S RPC0=$G(^XWB(8994,RPCIEN,0)) ; ; -- make sure there is data on node I RPC0="" D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D ERROR^DVPERR(182003,DVPNAME,DVPNAME,"") ; ; -- make sure x-ref is not corrupt and found the wrong entry I DVPNAME'=$P(RPC0,U) D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . N PARAMS S PARAMS(1)=DVPNAME,PARAMS(2)=$P(RPC0,U) . D ERROR^DVPERR(182008,DVPNAME,.PARAMS,"") ; ; -- check inactive flag I $P(RPC0,U,6)=1!($P(RPC0,U,6)=2) D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D ERROR^DVPERR(182004,DVPNAME,DVPNAME,"") ; ; -- if not already performed, check version, environment and set re-auth check flag ; ; -- reauthentication checks ; -- reauthenticate user based on type (i.e. DUZ,AV,VPID,CCOW,APPPROXY) ; -- if application proxy user, check if allowed to run RPC ; ; -- set context D CRCONTXT^XWBSEC(.DVPSEC,$G(@SOURCE@("RPC CONTEXT"))) I '+DVPSEC D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . N PARAMS S PARAMS(1)=$G(XQMES) . D ERROR^DVPERR(182005,DVPNAME,.PARAMS,"") ; ; -- check if appropriate context created ; ; ; -- setup info needed for RPC execution S TAG=$P(RPC0,U,2) S ROU=$P(RPC0,U,3) S DVPPTYPE=$P(RPC0,U,4) S DVPWRAP=$P(RPC0,U,8) ; ; -- setup timeout info S DVPDATA("DVP","TIMED OUT")=0 S DVPDATA("DVP","START")=$H ; ; Parse the PARAMS global and build params for method signature D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,ROU,.DVPDATA) ; ; -- Implement RPC Versioning later ; ; -- build method signature D ROUTINE^DVPUTL(TAG,ROU,$G(DVPDATA(ROU,"PARAMS")),.DVPR) ; ; -- check for RPC processing timeout ; ; -- Make sure there are no errors before continuing Q:'$G(DVPERR) $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; ; -- SET results D SETRESGL(.DVPR) ; Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; SETRESGL(DVPR) ; -- Process RPC data and set in results global ; N I,T,D ; -- single value I DVPPTYPE=1 S DVPR=$G(DVPR) S @TARGET@("results","result")=DVPR ; -- table delimited by CR+LF I DVPPTYPE=2 D Q . S I="" F S I=$O(DVPR(I)) Q:I="" S @TARGET@("results",I)=DVPR(I) ; -- word processing I DVPPTYPE=3 D Q . S I="" F S I=$O(DVPR(I)) Q:I="" S @TARGET@("results",I)=$G(DVPR(I)) ; -- global array I DVPPTYPE=4 D Q . I $E($G(DVPR))'="^" Q . M @TARGET@("results")=@DVPR . I $D(@DVPR) K @DVPR ; -- global instance I DVPPTYPE=5 D Q . I $E($G(DVPR))'="^" Q . S @TARGET@("results","result")=@DVPR ; -- variable length records only good up to 255 char) I DVPPTYPE=6 D . S I="" F S I=$O(DVPR(I)) Q:I="" S @TARGET@("results",I)=$C($L(DVPR(I))),@TARGET@("results",I)=DVPR(I) Q
